title: A Different Type of Story Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A situation where people are unhappy and may protest or cause trouble.
rounds.answer: unrest
rounds.explanation: unrest: A situation where people are unhappy and may protest or cause trouble.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: One of a kind; very special.
rounds.answer: unique
rounds.explanation: unique: One of a kind; very special.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Not finished or not having all the parts.
rounds.answer: incomplete
rounds.explanation: incomplete: Not finished or not having all the parts.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Feeling worried or uncomfortable about something.
rounds.answer: uneasy

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: One of a kind; very special.
rounds.answer: unique

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Not able to do something well or correctly.
rounds.answer: incompetent

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The rain was unexpected, so we got wet without our umbrellas.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: She was unaware that her friend needed help.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: My grandma has a unique necklace that no one else has.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Case of the Incomplete Rule, part 1': “Ask any student who felt unwelcome, _____, or ignored.” After the trial, the students gathered in the...
rounds.answer: uneasy
rounds.explanation: The text says: “Ask any student who felt unwelcome, uneasy, or ignored.” After the trial, the students gathered in the library.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Case of the Incomplete Rule, part 2': “Because some were too _____ to speak,” added Sophia.
rounds.answer: uncertain
rounds.explanation: The text says: “Because some were too uncertain to speak,” added Sophia.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Case of the Incomplete Rule, part 2': “Because people were _____ of its effects,” said Sami.
rounds.answer: unaware
rounds.explanation: The text says: “Because people were unaware of its effects,” said Sami.

games.title: Reading Detective
games.description: Use unit evidence to solve each reading clue.

rounds.prompt: How many bookshelves does Mrs Adam show the class?
choices: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
A situation where people are unhappy and may protest or cause trouble.
Feeling worried or uncomfortable about something.
rounds.answer: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.

rounds.prompt: Why do you think the writer chose a librarian as the character who explains the genres? What does this tell us about the importance of libraries?
choices: A situation where people are unhappy and may protest or cause trouble.
Feeling worried or uncomfortable about something.
Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
rounds.answer: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.

rounds.prompt: What was the old rule about? Why was it unfair?
choices: Feeling worried or uncomfortable about something.
Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
A situation where people are unhappy and may protest or cause trouble.
rounds.answer: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1: Genre Detective Game
rounds.target: In this game, one person describes a story without saying which genre it belongs to.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 3: Dramatic Reading
rounds.target: She was unaware that her friend needed help.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 5: Explain and Respond
rounds.target: Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: If you disregard the rules, you might get in trouble.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: She is incapable of lifting the heavy box by herself.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The superhero felt invincible when he saved the city from danger.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'dissatisfied' mean in this unit?
choices: Not happy or pleased with something.
A situation where people are unhappy and may protest or cause trouble.
Something that happens suddenly and is not planned.
rounds.answer: Not happy or pleased with something.
rounds.explanation: dissatisfied: Not happy or pleased with something.

rounds.prompt: What does 'incapable' mean in this unit?
choices: A situation where people are unhappy and may protest or cause trouble.
Something that happens suddenly and is not planned.
rounds.answer: Not able to do something.
rounds.explanation: incapable: Not able to do something.

rounds.prompt: What does 'unexpected' mean in this unit?
choices: Not known or recognised; something you have not seen before.
Something that happens suddenly and is not planned.
A situation where people are unhappy and may protest or cause trouble.
rounds.answer: Something that happens suddenly and is not planned.
rounds.explanation: unexpected: Something that happens suddenly and is not planned.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'discrimination'?
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: discrimination is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'navigable'?
rounds.answer: Adjective
rounds.explanation: navigable is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'unaware'?
rounds.answer: Adjective
rounds.explanation: unaware is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: Something that happens suddenly and is not planned.
Not known or recognised; something you have not seen before.
Not awake and not aware of what is happening.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: Not happy or pleased with something.
To ignore something or not pay attention to it.
To take something apart piece by piece.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: Hard to read or not clear enough to understand.
Very boring because it is always the same.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: What does 'unsuccessful' mean?
choices: Not achieving the desired result or goal.
Not awake and not aware of what is happening.
rounds.answer: Not achieving the desired result or goal.
rounds.explanation: He tried to climb the tree, but he was unsuccessful and fell down.

rounds.prompt: What does 'unfamiliar' mean?
choices: Not awake and not aware of what is happening.
Not known or recognised; something you have not seen before.
One of a kind; very special.
rounds.answer: Not known or recognised; something you have not seen before.
rounds.explanation: The new school was unfamiliar to me, so I felt a little nervous.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Case of the Incomplete Rule, part 1': “And this part says the rule was reviewed during a time of civil _____.” They flipped pages, curious and...
rounds.answer: unrest
rounds.explanation: The text says: “And this part says the rule was reviewed during a time of civil unrest.” They flipped pages, curious and focused.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: What does 'unrest' mean?
choices: A situation where people are unhappy and may protest or cause trouble.
Not achieving the desired result or goal.
Not known or recognised; something you have not seen before.
Something that happens suddenly and is not planned.
rounds.answer: A situation where people are unhappy and may protest or cause trouble.
rounds.explanation: There was unrest in the city because people wanted to change the rules.

rounds.prompt: What does 'uneasy' mean?
choices: Feeling worried or uncomfortable about something.
Not achieving the desired result or goal.
Not known or recognised; something you have not seen before.
rounds.answer: Feeling worried or uncomfortable about something.
rounds.explanation: I felt uneasy when I heard a strange noise in the dark.

rounds.prompt: What does 'unexpected' mean?
choices: Not known or recognised; something you have not seen before.
Something that happens suddenly and is not planned.
rounds.answer: Something that happens suddenly and is not planned.
rounds.explanation: The rain was unexpected, so we got wet without our umbrellas.
